title: Decision Quality Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger decision quality foundations judgment so founder performance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Decision Quality Foundations is a leverage point inside founder performance. It supports the broader goal of decision-making, time allocation, energy management, and resilience.
coreConcepts: Decision Quality Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good decision quality foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Decision Quality Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
